s1.ptxt: Check that ESP® warning light (1) comes ON for about 2 seconds and then goes OFF.

If ESP® warning light never light up, go to ESP® Warning Light Does Not Come ON after Setting Ignition “ON” . If ESP® warning light remains ON and no DTC is stored in ESP® control module, go to ESP® Warning Light Comes ON Steady .

Check that ABS warning light (1) comes ON for about 2 seconds and then goes OFF. If ABS warning light never lights up, go to ABS Warning Light Does Not Come ON after Setting Ignition “ON” . If ABS warning light remains ON and no DTC is stored in ABS control module, go to ABS Warning Light Comes ON Steady .

attention3.ptxt: Perform this check on a level place.

s1.ptxt: Check that EBD warning light (brake warning light) (1) comes ON. If EBD warning light (brake warning light) never lights up, go to EBD Warning Light (Brake Warning Light) Does Not Come ON after Setting Ignition to “ON” .

Release parking brake lever and check that EBD warning light goes OFF. If EBD warning light (brake warning light) remains ON and no DTC is stored in ESP® control module, go to EBD Warning Light (Brake Warning Light) Comes ON Steady .
